sqlMap.update: update board set board_title = #board_title# , prod_id = #prod_id# , board_date = sysdate , prod_id = #prod_id# , board_content = #board_content# , board_secrete = #board_secrete# where board_id = #board_id#
sqlMap.delete: delete from board where mem_id = #mem_id# and board_id = #board_id#
sqlMap.select: select board_id , mem_id , board_index , board_title , to_char(board_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') , board_content from board where board_index = #board_index#
SELECT BOARD_NO boardNo , BOARD_TITLE boardTitle , BOARD_WRITER boardWriter , TO_CHAR(BOARD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') boardDate , BOARD_CONTENT boardContent FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO = #boardNo#
